```{=html}
<div id="practice-timer" class="practice-timer" role="button" tabindex="0" title="Click to start or pause">
 <span class="pt-ico pt-ico-play"><i data-lucide="play" style="width:1em;height:1em;"></i></span>
 <span class="pt-ico pt-ico-pause"><i data-lucide="pause" style="width:1em;height:1em;"></i></span>
 <span class="pt-time">10:00</span>
</div>

<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="background:rgba(255,184,77,0.08);border-left:6px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:0 16px 16px 0;padding:1.7em 2.1em 1.8em;">

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.82em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.55em;">— practice 01 —</div>

  <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:800;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:1em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;white-space:nowrap;">
   Install and initialize all three software.
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:0.8em;">

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;">
    <a class="tool-link" href="https://claude.com/product/claude-code" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
     <div class="tool-icon">
      <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.4em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FBEEE8,#F5D9CD);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
       <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#CC785C" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:1em;height:1em;display:block;"><path d="M17.3041 3.541h-3.6718l6.696 16.918H24Zm-10.6082 0L0 20.459h3.7442l1.3693-3.5527h7.0052l1.3693 3.5528h3.7442L10.5363 3.5409Zm-.3712 10.2232 2.2914-5.9456 2.2914 5.9456Z"/></svg>
      </div>
     </div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;color:#E8A589;">Claude Code</div>
    </a>
    <div style="font-size:0.46em;color:#C9C4BC;line-height:1.5;margin-top:0.2em;">AI agent by Anthropic.</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;">
    <a class="tool-link" href="https://positron.posit.co" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
     <div class="tool-icon">
      <img src="figs/positron-icon.png" alt="Positron" style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;object-fit:contain;display:block;margin:0;" />
     </div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;color:#7FB0E6;">Positron</div>
    </a>
    <div style="font-size:0.46em;color:#C9C4BC;line-height:1.5;margin-top:0.2em;">Data science IDE by Posit.</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;">
    <a class="tool-link" href="https://spokenly.app" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
     <div class="tool-icon">
      <img src="figs/spokenly-logo.png" alt="Spokenly" style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;object-fit:contain;display:block;margin:0;" />
     </div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;color:#6FC2B0;">Spokenly</div>
    </a>
    <div style="font-size:0.46em;color:#C9C4BC;line-height:1.5;margin-top:0.2em;">Voice-to-text app.</div>
   </div>

  </div>

 </div>

</div>

<script>
(function(){
  function init(){
    var el = document.getElementById('practice-timer');
    if(!el || el.dataset.wired) return;
    el.dataset.wired = '1';
    var display = el.querySelector('.pt-time');
    var TOTAL = 600, STEP = 5;
    var remaining = TOTAL, id = null;
    function fmt(s){ var m = Math.floor(s/60), x = s % 60; return m + ':' + (x < 10 ? '0' : '') + x; }
    function render(){ display.textContent = fmt(remaining); }
    function stop(){ if(id){ clearInterval(id); id = null; } el.classList.remove('pt-running'); }
    function tick(){
      remaining -= STEP;
      if(remaining <= 0){ remaining = 0; render(); stop(); el.classList.add('pt-done'); return; }
      render();
    }
    function start(){
      if(id) return;
      if(remaining <= 0){ remaining = TOTAL; el.classList.remove('pt-done'); render(); }
      id = setInterval(tick, STEP * 1000);
      el.classList.add('pt-running');
    }
    function toggle(){ if(id) stop(); else start(); }
    el.addEventListener('click', toggle);
    el.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if(e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' '){ e.preventDefault(); toggle(); } });
    render();
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init); else init();
})();
</script>
```
